records.name: Dimensional Image: "24"
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, "24" gains [Arg1] Aliemus. At turn start, if "24" is in the "Depressed Persona" state at turn start, she gains an additional [Arg2] Aliemus; if in the "Manic Persona" state, her Temporary Crit. Rate and Temporary Crit. DMG +[Arg2]%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Agrippa
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Agrippa gains [Arg1] Aliemus. {Reluctant Alms} will also reduce Agrippa's Arithmetica Cost by [Arg2] for this turn, triggering a maximum of once per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Aigis
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Aigis gains [Arg1] Aliemus. When Aigis deals DMG to enemies with Vulnerable, she also steals [Arg2] Temporary {STR}, up to [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Alva
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Alva gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Within 1 turn, after playing the [Arg2]nd "Defense" card, place a {Precision Slash} with {Exhaust} into hand; after playing the [Arg3]nd "Strike" card, place a {Combat Stance} with {Exhaust} into hand.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Aurita
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Aurita gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The DMG count of {Gland Division} +[Arg2], and after playing Aurita's "Defense," 1 {Gland Division} is added to hand.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Caecus
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Caecus gains [Arg1] Aliemus. When Caecus gains a Shield, he regains [Arg2]% of the Shield amount as HP.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Casiah
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Casiah gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Drawing 1 card grants Casiah [Arg2] Aliemus. When Casiah unleashes Exalt, all enemies lose [Arg3] {STR}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Castor
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Castor gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Place 2 {Onyx Plume} into hand at the start of battle. Gain [Arg2] Temporary {STR} when {Onyx Plume} is played for the first time each turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Celeste
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Celeste gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Before turn end, for each Command Card of Celeste in hand, 1 Tentacle attacks an enemy and restores [Heal:Arg2] HP.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Clementine
records.descriptionTemplate: At the start of turn, Clementine gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Clementine's Command Cards' DMG dealt, Shield Generation, HP Recovery, Aliemus Generation, and Keyflare Generation effects increase by 1.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Corposant
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Corposant gains [Arg1] Aliemus and 1 Temporary Tentacle. Whenever {Death Resistance} is triggered, Corposant gains [Arg2] Aliemus, and places 1 {Lightning Retribution} with 0 Arithmetica Cost and {Exhaust} into hand.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Daffodil
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Daffodil gains [Arg1] Aliemus and 1 "Insight" card. The Strength gained from {Heterogeneous Tides} +[Arg2]%, and each card played permanently increases it further by [Arg3]% for this exploration, up to [Arg4]%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Doll
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Doll gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After the battle starts, set the Arithmetica Cost of Doll's {Equivalent Exchange} to 0. Once it is played, draw [Arg2] extra cards in the next turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Doresain
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Doresain gains [Arg1] Aliemus and [Arg2] {STR}. When Doresain consumes a {Corpse}, he gains Temporary {STR} equal to 20% of Doresain's Permanent {STR}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Erica
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Erica gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After playing [Arg2] Command Cards within 1 turn, Erica gains 2 Arithmetica and doubles the {STR} and {Alert} bonuses for {Electromagnetic Blast} in this battle.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Faint
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Faint gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Faint's Shield, {Counter}, and HP recovery effects +[Arg2]%. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, this effect +[Arg3]% for the current exploration, up to [Arg4] {plural:[Arg4]|time|times}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Faros
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Faros gains [Arg1] Aliemus. For every 2 instances of {Tentacle DMG} dealt, Faros' {Poison} and Shield effects in this battle +[Arg2]%, up to 50%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Doll: Inferno
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Doll: Inferno gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After Doll: Inferno unleashes Exalt, for every [Arg2] Aliemus consumed, other Awakeners gain 1 point of Aliemus.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Helot: Catena
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Helot: Catena gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Helot: Catena's Active DMG adds [Arg2]% Bleeding, and killing an enemy causes Bleeding equal to the excess DMG to other enemies.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Ramona: Timeworn
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Ramona: Timeworn gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The first time {Loop} is triggered each turn, gain [Arg2] Keyflare and [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Negentropy}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Goliath
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Goliath gains [Arg1] Aliemus. If Goliath deals DMG [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times} within 1 turn, the DMG dealt by Goliath in this battle enjoys an additional 1x {STR} bonus, with a cooldown of 3 turns.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Hameln
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Hameln gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The Arithmetica Cost of {Soul Overture} -[Arg2], and the Base DMG count is +[Arg3].

records.name: Dimensional Image: Helot
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Helot gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Each time a card is discarded, Helot gains [Arg2] Aliemus.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Horla
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Horla gains [Arg1] Aliemus. At the start of the battle, gain [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Metaphor} for all emotions, increasing the {Metaphor} effect by 50%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Jenkin
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Jenkin gains [Arg1] Aliemus, with Final DMG +[Arg2]%. The Base DMG and DMG growth of {Get 'em! Brown!} are +[Arg3]%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Karen
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Karen gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Playing {Silent Fealty} will return double the {Exhausted} Arithmetica, with a cooldown of [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|turn|turns}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Kathigu-Ra
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Kathigu-Ra gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After accumulating 10 stacks of {Fiamma}, immediately draw 1 Kathigu-Ra's Command Card and grant it 3 stacks of {Fiamma}. This effect will not accumulate stacks for the rest of this turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Leigh
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Leigh gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Whenever she loses HP, she gains [Arg2] {STR}, up to [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per battle. After stacking [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times}, the Arithmetica Cost of {Pain and Pleasure} -2, and the DMG count +1.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Lily
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Lily gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Lily's {Endure} limit +100%, and when releasing {Undying Flower Upon Slime} or {Strike to Protect}, Lily restores HP equal to 8% of the {Endure} stacks.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Liz
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Liz gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Cards discarded by {Dance to Destruction} takes effect 1 more time, with a 3-turn cooldown.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Lotan
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Lotan gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After the first use of Lotan's "Defense" each turn, place [Arg2] additional {Exhaust} and {Fleeting} cards with the Illusion's {Blade of Defiance} into hand.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Miryam
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Miryam gains [Arg1] Aliemus and puts 1 {Sacrament} into hand.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Mouchette
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Mouchette gains [Arg1] Aliemus and generates 1 Temporary Strike with an Arithmetica Cost of 0. Each time "Dramatic Encounter" is triggered, increase the Base DMG and Strike DMG increase effect of {Shining☆Tornado} by [Arg2]% for this battle.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Murphy
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Murphy gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Murphy's "Strike" and "Defense" can convert [Arg2]% of the {Sacrifice} into Temporary {Tentacle DMG}, but can only take effect once per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Murphy: Fauxborn
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Arg1] Aliemus. {Waltz of Lemuria} takes effect 3 times every {ordinal:3rd} play.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Nautila
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Nautila gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After using Nautila's "Exalt," gain {Counter} and Delayed Shield equal to [Arg2]% of the current Shield, triggering at most once per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Nymphaea
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Nymphaea gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After playing Nymphaea's "Strike," the {Poison} dealt by "Nymphaea" in this battle +[Arg2]%. After playing Nymphaea's "Defense," it triggers [Arg3]% {Poison} to all enemies. Each effect can take place at most once per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Ogier
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Ogier gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After the first time Ogier plays {Piercing Strike} or "Strike" in each turn, the Shield and {STR} Ogier generates in that turn +[Arg2]%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Pandia
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Pandia gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After Pandia performs an Exalt, she gains Permanent {Counter} equivalent to [Arg2]% of her Temporary {Counter}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Pickman
records.descriptionTemplate: At the start of the turn, Pickman gains [Arg1] Aliemus. For each stack of {Creativity} gained, randomly reduce the Arithmetica Cost of 1 card in hand by 1 for this turn. When Pickman consumes {Creativity}, all Awakeners additionally gain [Arg2] Aliemus.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Pollux
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Pollux gains [Arg1] Aliemus. At the start of the battle, gain 1 {Sacred Heart}. When {Exhausted} at its {ordinal:3rd} use, {Sacred Heart} inflicts Vulnerable on all enemies and deal DMG twice.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Ramona
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Ramona gains [Arg1] Aliemus. For every [Arg2]rd Command Card played, that Command Card takes effect 1 additional time and gains [Arg3] Keyflare.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Ryker
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Ryker gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The result of the first dice roll each turn is always maxed out.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Salvador
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Salvador gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Each time he accumulates {Crimson Furnace}, he also gains [Arg2]% {STR} of the accumulated amount. Salvador's "Strike" and {End of Suffering} additionally receive a [Arg3]x {STR} bonus.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Sanga
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Sanga gains [Arg1] Aliemus. At the start of the battle, grant all of Sanga's Command Cards {Retain} and {Prepare 1}, and gain [Arg2] Shield.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Sorel
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Sorel gains [Arg1] Aliemus. For each instance of DMG dealt by Sorel, {Embryo Fusion} +[Arg2]%, up to [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per turn. After triggering 10 times, Sorel's Final DMG in this battle +[Arg4]%.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Tawil
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Tawil gains [Arg1] Aliemus. If [Arg2] of Tawil's Command Cards are played in one turn, add 1 {Silver Key Dawn} to hand, cooldown [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|turn|turns}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Thais
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Thais gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After playing [Arg2] Command Cards in one turn, Thais gains 1 {Scion of Purity} and [Arg3] Temporary {STR}, with a cooldown of [Arg4] {plural:[Arg4]|turn|turns}.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Tinct
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Tinct gains [Arg1] Aliemus. After triggering a {Leap} with Tinct's Command Card, return it to hand and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1. This effect can occur a maximum of [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|time|times} per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Tulu
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Tulu gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The Aliemus Cost for Tulu -[Arg2], and after releasing Exalt, it instantly generates [Arg3] Temporary Tentacles.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Uvhash
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Uvhash gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Uvhash's Base Aliemus -[Arg2], which further -5 every time he releases Exalt. He can release Exalt [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|time|times} per turn.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Wanda
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Wanda gains [Arg1] Aliemus and [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Dreamlure}. If this is an {Ultra Round}, additionally put 1 Temporary {Spine Needle Chains} and {Keeper of the Lost} into hand, and cause Wanda's next Command Card to take effect 2 times.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Winkle
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Winkle gains [Arg1] Aliemus. Each time another Awakeners unleashes Exalt, Winkle gains [Arg2] Aliemus, and the Arithmetica Cost of {Psyche Reforged} in hand -[Arg3].

records.name: Dimensional Image: Xu
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Xu gains [Arg1] Aliemus and inflicts 1 stack of {Spellbound} on all enemies. The first Command Card Xu plays each turn will trigger the {Resonance} effect.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Vortice
records.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, Vortice gains [Arg1] Aliemus. The first {Charge!} or {Reload!} played each turn takes effect twice.

records.name: Dimensional Image: Arachne
records.descriptionTemplate: Arachne gains [Arg1] Aliemus at turn start. "Strike" and "Defense" immediately trigger {Pursuit}: {Infinite Threads} once, with each taking effect at most once per turn.
